intent.use: Region theme for the wild canyon country beyond the river: cliffs, rope bridges, riders, outlaws. Plays while exploring/riding there. Melody-first by design — the player should hum this on the way to the fridge.
intent.narrative: Karmanjaka is the untamed land in the mountains — Katla's country, riders and rebels. Where Cherry Valley says 'you are home', this says 'ride'. Inspired by the Gerudo Valley school of area themes: a bold, unforgettable tune with flamenco fire, not background wallpaper. No melody is forbidden.
references: Koji Kondo — Gerudo Valley (Ocarina of Time)

sfx_pitching.note: Pitch one-shot SFX (footsteps, UI, chimes) to musical.key.sfx_safe_pitch_classes so they sit inside the harmony; quantize their trigger time to timing.beats_s (or downbeats_s for big moments).

audio.note: audio.file is the lossless master (analysis ground truth); stream a `compressed` copy on web/mobile.

sections.name: Intro - Falseta and Palmas
sections.description: Solo flamenco guitar falsetas over palmas and hand percussion — the groove and attitude arrive before the tune.
sync_hints: Strong percussion onsets — sync hoofbeats/footsteps to beats_s and they read as part of the band.
Good entry point when crossing into the region.

sections.name: Main Theme - Enter Trumpet
sections.description: The trumpet states the main melody — proud, singable, the heart of the track.
sync_hints: Region title card / vista reveal on this section's first downbeat.
Peaks here are ideal for scripted stunts (bridge collapse, hawk flyover).

sections.name: Bridge - Lyrical Half-Time
sections.description: Half-time bridge: lyrical guitar solo over low strings — the danger under the swagger.
sync_hints: Good window for dialogue or discovering something ominous; mix leaves headroom.

sections.name: Climax - Full Ensemble Return
sections.description: Full ensemble reprise — theme harmonized, strings soaring, maximum ride energy; ends crisply for the loop seam.
sync_hints: Highest intensity window — chase sequences and mounted sprints belong here.
Loop seam: crossfade quickly (250 ms) back into canyon_groove on a downbeat.

sections.name: Outro - Seamless Loop Tail
styles: tail designed to loop back into Intro

events.note: onsets_s = every audible attack (fire discrete FX here); peaks = the strongest hits (thunder/flash-worthy).

dynamics.note: 50 ms loudness curve in dBFS — drive continuous effects (light, fog, camera) from this, index = t / hop_s.

loop.note: Generated audio is not sample-loop-perfect; crossfade loop_end into loop_start over crossfade_ms.

engine.prompt: A bold, melody-first orchestral-flamenco region theme for a wild canyon land in an adventure game: virtuosic Spanish nylon-string guitar, rhythmic hand claps (palmas) and castanets, driving hand percussion, and a proud, singable trumpet melody with a dusty spaghetti-western edge. Structure: fiery solo guitar falsetas and claps set the groove; the trumpet then states a strong, memorable main theme any player could hum; a moodier half-time bridge lets the guitar take a lyrical solo over low strings; then the full ensemble returns with the main theme bigger, harmonized, with soaring strings, ending crisply so it loops straight back into the opening groove. Strictly instrumental. E Phrygian dominant (Spanish scale), 126 BPM, 4/4, tight rhythmic pulse throughout. High-fidelity, punchy, close and dry like a band in a canyon, confident and adventurous. Avoid: vocals, sung lyrics, singing, spoken word, chiptune, 8-bit, lo-fi, distortion, harsh percussion, EDM, trap beat, abrupt ending, fade to silence mid-phrase.

positive_local_styles: tail designed to loop back into Intro
